metadata.purpose: Synthetic test dataset for GovGuard v2, strictly aligned to GAO_AI_SaaS_Problem_Solution_Dataset.md.
categories_covered: C4 - Structural Blind Spots in High-Risk Programs

scenarios.title: Medicare FFS duplicate billing across MACs

gao_reference.title: Medicare Fee-for-Service Improper Payments
gao_reference.mapping: Static pre-payment edits miss duplicate Part A/B claims processed by different MACs; scenario validates pre-payment ML scoring against provider history and peer billing patterns.

scenarios.scenario_description: A Medicare Part B provider (NPI 1234567890) submits 47 CPT 99214 claims for beneficiary HIC 123-45-6789A across 9 days; the same beneficiary received an inpatient stay billed via Part A by a different MAC. Static edits passed; peer-group billing density for this CPT/provider sits in the 99.7th percentile.
scenarios.triggered_workflow: M1 anomaly detection -> M2 fraud engine cross-claim graph -> M4 pre-payment hold -> reviewer queue
scenarios.expected_system_behavior: M1 flags peer-cohort outlier; M2 detects Part A/B service overlap for the same HIC on overlapping DOS; M4 applies a pre-payment hold and routes to clinical review with documentation-NLP score.

expected_output.anomaly_class: Peer-cohort velocity + Part A/B service overlap
expected_output.recommended_action: Hold claims A-2026-00471/472/488; request medical records; refer to UPIC

scenarios.pass_fail_criteria: PASS if alert_type='PRE_PAYMENT_DUPLICATE_OVERLAP', risk_score within ±0.05 of 0.93, anomaly_class matches, recommended_action text contains key tokens. FAIL otherwise.

scenarios.title: Cross-state Medicaid duplicate enrollment

gao_reference.title: Medicaid Eligibility Errors and Cross-State Duplication
gao_reference.mapping: Beneficiary enrolled simultaneously in multiple state MMIS with no real-time interstate ledger; validates federated eligibility matching.

scenarios.scenario_description: A beneficiary is concurrently enrolled in TX Medicaid (effective 2025-11-01) and FL Medicaid (effective 2026-01-15) with the same SSN and DOB; IRS wage data shows W-2 earnings in FL only.
scenarios.triggered_workflow: M5 federated identity match -> M3 eligibility recertification trigger -> M4 payment hold on lower-confidence state
scenarios.expected_system_behavior: M5 produces a high-confidence cross-state match; M3 opens recertification cases in both states; M4 holds capitation payment in the state with weaker presence signals (TX).

expected_output.recommended_action: Suspend TX capitation; cross-notify TX HHSC and FL AHCA

scenarios.pass_fail_criteria: PASS if alert_type='CROSS_STATE_DUPLICATE_ENROLLMENT', risk_score within ±0.05 of 0.88, anomaly_class matches, recommended_action text contains key tokens. FAIL otherwise.

scenarios.title: Pandemic UI synthetic-identity ring across states

gao_reference.title: Pandemic Unemployment Insurance Fraud
gao_reference.mapping: Synthetic identities filing UI claims across multiple states; validates identity-graph + device-fingerprint correlation.

scenarios.scenario_description: Eighteen UI claims filed within 36 hours across CA, NV, AZ, and GA from 4 device fingerprints and 2 residential-proxy IP ASNs; claimant SSNs include 3 valid SSNs combined with fabricated names and DOBs (synthetic-identity pattern).
scenarios.triggered_workflow: M2 identity-graph clustering -> M5 cross-state correlation -> M6 synthetic-identity score -> M4 freeze
scenarios.expected_system_behavior: M2 builds a tight cluster across 18 claims; M5 confirms multi-state overlap; M6 returns synthetic-identity probability > 0.9; M4 freezes disbursement and queues for state UI integrity units.

expected_output.compliance_violation: State UI verification (e.g., CA UI Code §1257) + eCBSV mismatch
expected_output.recommended_action: Freeze all 18 claims; refer to DOL OIG and state UI fraud units

scenarios.pass_fail_criteria: PASS if alert_type='SYNTHETIC_ID_RING_MULTI_STATE', risk_score within ±0.05 of 0.96, anomaly_class matches, recommended_action text contains key tokens. FAIL otherwise.

scenarios.title: PPP fictitious-business loan cluster

gao_reference.title: PPP and EIDL Loan Fraud
gao_reference.mapping: Fictitious businesses with shared banking ABA/account and address; validates pre-disbursement graph analytics against IRS/state/FinCEN signals.

scenarios.scenario_description: Six PPP applications submitted by entities formed within 30 days, all listing the same UPS Store address in Miami, identical average monthly payroll, and direct-deposit accounts at one credit union sharing the last 6 digits of the routing path.
scenarios.triggered_workflow: M4 pre-disbursement gate -> M5 entity graph -> M2 cluster score -> hold all 6
scenarios.expected_system_behavior: M4 fails IRS-941 existence check; M5 graph links 6 EINs via address + ABA; M2 returns cluster fraud probability > 0.95; all six disbursements held.

expected_output.recommended_action: Reject all 6 applications; refer to SBA OIG

scenarios.pass_fail_criteria: PASS if alert_type='SHELL_ENTITY_CLUSTER', risk_score within ±0.05 of 0.97, anomaly_class matches, recommended_action text contains key tokens. FAIL otherwise.

scenarios.title: ERC promoter-cluster pre-refund detection

gao_reference.title: Employee Retention Credit (ERC) Tax Fraud
gao_reference.mapping: Aggressive ERC promoters file mass amended 941-X with implausible eligibility; validates pre-refund ML + EFIN cluster detection.

scenarios.scenario_description: A single EFIN submits 1,142 Form 941-X amendments claiming ERC averaging $238k per filer; 87% claim full government-order suspension; industry-revenue benchmarks (BEA NAICS 722) show median <14% revenue decline in 2021Q2.
scenarios.triggered_workflow: M2 promoter-cluster detection -> M6 implausibility score -> M4 pre-refund freeze cohort
scenarios.expected_system_behavior: M2 detects EFIN-level clustering; M6 scores cohort against BEA/Census benchmarks; M4 places cohort-wide pre-refund hold pending documentation.

expected_output.recommended_action: Freeze cohort refunds; open CI promoter investigation

scenarios.pass_fail_criteria: PASS if alert_type='PROMOTER_DRIVEN_ERC_COHORT', risk_score within ±0.05 of 0.94, anomaly_class matches, recommended_action text contains key tokens. FAIL otherwise.

scenarios.title: SSDI overpayment from unreported earnings

gao_reference.title: Social Security Disability Insurance Overpayments
gao_reference.mapping: Unreported earnings above SGA threshold; validates continuous wage monitoring + CDR prioritization.

scenarios.scenario_description: An SSDI recipient receives $1,538/month while IRS quarterly wage data shows W-2 income averaging $4,320/month for 7 consecutive months — well above SGA ($1,620/month, 2026).
scenarios.triggered_workflow: M1 earnings-vs-benefit anomaly -> M6 CDR priority score -> M4 case open
scenarios.expected_system_behavior: M1 flags 7-month wage trend above SGA; M6 assigns high CDR priority; M4 opens overpayment case and projects recoupment.

expected_output.recommended_action: Open CDR; estimated overpayment $18,892

scenarios.pass_fail_criteria: PASS if alert_type='SGA_BREACH_UNDETECTED', risk_score within ±0.05 of 0.86, anomaly_class matches, recommended_action text contains key tokens. FAIL otherwise.

scenarios.title: EITC qualifying-child cross-claim

gao_reference.title: Earned Income Tax Credit Improper Payments
gao_reference.mapping: Same SSN claimed as qualifying child on two unrelated returns; validates SSA dependency cross-match pre-refund.

scenarios.scenario_description: Two unrelated taxpayers (different filing addresses, no marital history) each claim the same child SSN as a qualifying child for EITC; SSA dependency file links the child to neither.
scenarios.triggered_workflow: M2 cross-return SSN reuse -> M4 soft-block both returns pre-refund
scenarios.expected_system_behavior: M2 detects same-child cross-claim; M4 issues soft-block with EITC due-diligence documentation request to both filers.

expected_output.recommended_action: Soft-block; issue Form 886-H-EIC requests

scenarios.pass_fail_criteria: PASS if alert_type='EITC_CROSS_CLAIM', risk_score within ±0.05 of 0.82, anomaly_class matches, recommended_action text contains key tokens. FAIL otherwise.

scenarios.title: SNAP retailer trafficking detection at POS

gao_reference.title: SNAP Retailer Trafficking
gao_reference.mapping: Even-dollar EBT transactions, high velocity, repeat customer overlap; validates real-time POS anomaly scoring.

scenarios.scenario_description: A small convenience store (FNS#0049771, 1.2 registers) shows 312 EBT transactions in 14 days at even-dollar amounts ($40, $60, $80), with 73% of transactions from 14 repeat households whose households cluster by IP-geolocated benefit applications.
scenarios.triggered_workflow: M1 transaction anomaly -> M5 customer-overlap graph -> ALERT generation
scenarios.expected_system_behavior: M1 surfaces even-dollar + velocity anomaly; M5 confirms customer-overlap cluster; ALERT case generated for FNS investigation.

expected_output.recommended_action: Open ALERT investigation; consider TRO of EBT eligibility

scenarios.pass_fail_criteria: PASS if alert_type='SNAP_TRAFFICKING_SUSPECTED', risk_score within ±0.05 of 0.89, anomaly_class matches, recommended_action text contains key tokens. FAIL otherwise.

scenarios.title: Travel card weekend personal misuse

gao_reference.title: Federal Employee Travel Card Abuse
gao_reference.mapping: Cardholder uses travel card off-TDY for personal MCCs; validates real-time transaction scoring against travel authorization.

scenarios.scenario_description: GSA SmartPay travel cardholder posts $1,847 across 9 transactions on a Saturday/Sunday at MCC 5921 (liquor) and MCC 7995 (gambling) in Las Vegas while no travel authorization is active.
scenarios.triggered_workflow: M1 off-policy MCC + geo -> M4 supervisor alert within 24h
scenarios.expected_system_behavior: M1 detects MCC violations with no active travel auth; M4 routes to supervisor and AOPC with 24h SLA.

expected_output.recommended_action: Suspend card; refer to AOPC and HR

scenarios.pass_fail_criteria: PASS if alert_type='PCARD_OFF_POLICY_MISUSE', risk_score within ±0.05 of 0.91, anomaly_class matches, recommended_action text contains key tokens. FAIL otherwise.

scenarios.title: Cross-ERP duplicate invoice (DEAMS vs GFEBS)

gao_reference.title: Duplicate Vendor Payments in DoD and Civilian Agencies
gao_reference.mapping: Same invoice submitted under variant PO numbers in two ERPs; validates fuzzy fingerprinting + pre-payment block.

scenarios.scenario_description: Vendor 'Atlantic Systems Inc.' submits invoice #INV-77241 ($412,887.50) to DEAMS under PO F8B-2025-1144, and the same invoice with line items split into 3 sub-invoices to GFEBS under PO W912DR-2025-0888 the next day.
scenarios.triggered_workflow: M5 cross-ERP invoice fingerprint -> M1 fuzzy duplicate match -> M4 pre-payment block
scenarios.expected_system_behavior: M5 fingerprints invoices across DEAMS and GFEBS; M1 returns high-similarity match despite split lines; M4 blocks GFEBS payment.

expected_output.recommended_action: Hold GFEBS payments; recover if disbursed

scenarios.pass_fail_criteria: PASS if alert_type='CROSS_ERP_DUPLICATE_INVOICE', risk_score within ±0.05 of 0.92, anomaly_class matches, recommended_action text contains key tokens. FAIL otherwise.

scenarios.title: Ghost employee on grant-funded payroll

gao_reference.title: Phantom or 'Ghost' Employees in Federal Payroll
gao_reference.mapping: Deceased employee still on direct deposit; validates HR-payroll-DMF continuous reconciliation.

scenarios.scenario_description: Employee on NIH R01 grant payroll continues to receive bi-weekly deposits of $3,840 for 4 cycles after a state vital-records death event; T&A submitted by a supervisor account that also submits for 22 other employees.
scenarios.triggered_workflow: M1 DMF mismatch -> M3 grant cost monitor -> M4 payroll hold
scenarios.expected_system_behavior: M1 reconciles payroll roster with DMF and flags continued pay; M3 flags unallowable salary charge to NIH grant; M4 halts next deposit and opens supervisor review.

expected_output.recommended_action: Stop payroll; recover $15,360; refer to OIG; review supervisor's 22 reports

scenarios.pass_fail_criteria: PASS if alert_type='GHOST_EMPLOYEE_DMF_MATCH', risk_score within ±0.05 of 0.95, anomaly_class matches, recommended_action text contains key tokens. FAIL otherwise.

scenarios.title: Disaster Duplication-of-Benefits across FEMA, SBA, NFIP

gao_reference.title: Disaster Assistance Duplication
gao_reference.mapping: Survivor receives FEMA IHP, SBA disaster loan, and NFIP payout for the same loss; validates federated DOB engine.

scenarios.scenario_description: Hurricane survivor receives $33,000 FEMA IHP, $185,000 SBA disaster loan, and $172,000 NFIP claim for the same property; Stafford Act DOB worksheet not reconciled at disbursement.
scenarios.triggered_workflow: M5 cross-program survivor match -> M6 DOB calculation -> M3 SBA award reduction recommendation
scenarios.expected_system_behavior: M5 resolves survivor identity across three programs; M6 computes documented loss vs aggregate payout and flags $72k duplication; M3 emits award-reduction recommendation to SBA.

expected_output.recommended_action: Reduce SBA loan by $72k; document on DOB worksheet

scenarios.pass_fail_criteria: PASS if alert_type='STAFFORD_DOB_DETECTED', risk_score within ±0.05 of 0.78, anomaly_class matches, recommended_action text contains key tokens. FAIL otherwise.

scenarios.title: Medicare DME geographic mismatch (CGM scheme)

gao_reference.title: Medicare DME Fraud
gao_reference.mapping: FL supplier shipping CGMs nationwide on one prescriber's orders; validates supplier-prescriber-beneficiary graph analytics.

scenarios.scenario_description: DME supplier in Hialeah, FL bills Medicare for 2,914 CGM devices shipped to beneficiaries in 41 states over 60 days; 87% of orders originated from a single telehealth prescriber NPI.
scenarios.triggered_workflow: M5 supplier-prescriber graph -> M2 fraud pattern model -> M4 supplier revocation queue
scenarios.expected_system_behavior: M5 graph links 2,914 claims to a single prescriber and 1 supplier; M2 returns high DME-fraud probability; M4 queues supplier for expedited revocation review.

expected_output.recommended_action: Suspend payments; refer to CMS CPI and HHS-OIG

scenarios.pass_fail_criteria: PASS if alert_type='DME_GEOGRAPHIC_MISMATCH', risk_score within ±0.05 of 0.95, anomaly_class matches, recommended_action text contains key tokens. FAIL otherwise.

scenarios.title: Hospice live-discharge length-of-stay outlier

gao_reference.title: Medicare Hospice Fraud
gao_reference.mapping: Non-terminal patient hospice enrollment; validates live-discharge / LOS outlier detection + certifier concentration.

scenarios.scenario_description: Hospice provider in Las Vegas shows 41% live-discharge rate and median LOS of 312 days; one certifying physician signs 78% of elections; chart NLP shows weak terminal-prognosis documentation.
scenarios.triggered_workflow: M2 hospice integrity model -> M6 outlier ranking -> M4 audit queue
scenarios.expected_system_behavior: M2 returns hospice fraud probability > 0.85; M6 ranks provider in top decile; M4 queues for CMS targeted audit.

expected_output.recommended_action: Initiate TPE review; consider 6-month suspension

scenarios.pass_fail_criteria: PASS if alert_type='HOSPICE_LOS_LIVE_DISCHARGE_OUTLIER', risk_score within ±0.05 of 0.88, anomaly_class matches, recommended_action text contains key tokens. FAIL otherwise.

scenarios.title: Genetic-testing telehealth scheme emergence

gao_reference.title: Genetic Testing Telemedicine Fraud (Medicare)
gao_reference.mapping: Telehealth-prescriber-lab triangle with explosive first-wave submissions; validates near-real-time pattern detection.

scenarios.scenario_description: First 5 days after CGx CPT code edit change, claims spike from $80k/day baseline to $2.1M/day from 3 labs sharing telehealth platform Tier-3 partners; prescribers have <0.5% prior history of cancer-related orders.
scenarios.triggered_workflow: M1 daily-volume change-point -> M2 graph emerges -> M6 emerging-scheme ranking
scenarios.expected_system_behavior: M1 detects step-change in CGx submissions; M2 builds platform-prescriber-lab graph; M6 ranks as 'emerging scheme - high'.

expected_output.recommended_action: Prepayment hold on CPT 81479/81455 from involved NPIs; refer to UPIC

scenarios.pass_fail_criteria: PASS if alert_type='EMERGING_SCHEME_CGX', risk_score within ±0.05 of 0.93, anomaly_class matches, recommended_action text contains key tokens. FAIL otherwise.

scenarios.title: P-card split purchase to evade micro-purchase threshold

gao_reference.title: Federal Purchase Card (P-Card) Misuse
gao_reference.mapping: Three sequential charges of $3,300, $3,250, $3,400 at one merchant within 35 minutes to evade $10,000 single-purchase threshold.

scenarios.scenario_description: Cardholder makes three IT-equipment purchases at the same vendor within 35 minutes totaling $9,950 — each just below the $10,000 micro-purchase threshold.
scenarios.triggered_workflow: M1 split-purchase pattern within 1h window -> AO review
scenarios.expected_system_behavior: M1 sums same-cardholder/same-merchant transactions within rolling window and flags threshold-evasion pattern.

expected_output.recommended_action: Cardholder counseling; AO confirmation; potential card suspension

scenarios.pass_fail_criteria: PASS if alert_type='SPLIT_PURCHASE_THRESHOLD_EVASION', risk_score within ±0.05 of 0.81, anomaly_class matches, recommended_action text contains key tokens. FAIL otherwise.

scenarios.title: T&M labor-category overbilling (resume vs invoice mismatch)

gao_reference.title: Time-and-Materials Contract Overbilling
gao_reference.mapping: Subcontractor labor billed at Senior Architect rate against resumes showing junior experience; validates NLP labor-cat verification.

scenarios.scenario_description: Prime contractor invoices DHS for 12 'Senior Cloud Architect' FTEs at $245/hr for 6 months; uploaded resumes show median 2.1 years' experience vs labor-cat minimum of 10 years.
scenarios.triggered_workflow: M2 NLP resume<->lcat match -> M3 contract compliance flag -> recovery audit
scenarios.expected_system_behavior: M2 returns low resume-to-lcat similarity; M3 flags non-conforming labor; recovery audit estimated at $1.6M over period.

expected_output.recommended_action: Issue cure notice; recover $1.6M; downgrade lcat

scenarios.pass_fail_criteria: PASS if alert_type='LABOR_CATEGORY_MISCLASSIFICATION', risk_score within ±0.05 of 0.87, anomaly_class matches, recommended_action text contains key tokens. FAIL otherwise.

scenarios.title: DoD MDAP EVM early-warning overrun

gao_reference.title: DoD Cost-Plus Contract Overruns
gao_reference.mapping: EVM CPI/SPI trends predict overrun on a major weapons program; validates predictive overrun ML.

scenarios.scenario_description: Major program (notional MDAP-X) shows CPI=0.78, SPI=0.82, with supplier on-time-delivery at 61% and parametric should-cost indicating 14% over baseline; ML predicts 23% lifecycle overrun.
scenarios.triggered_workflow: M6 EVM ingestion -> overrun forecast -> PEO dashboard alert
scenarios.expected_system_behavior: M6 ingests monthly CPRs, fits parametric should-cost model, and produces overrun forecast with confidence interval.

expected_output.recommended_action: Trigger should-cost review; corrective-action plan

scenarios.pass_fail_criteria: PASS if alert_type='MDAP_OVERRUN_FORECAST', risk_score within ±0.05 of 0.84, anomaly_class matches, recommended_action text contains key tokens. FAIL otherwise.

scenarios.title: Bid rigging via complementary bidding

gao_reference.title: Procurement Collusion and Bid Rigging
gao_reference.mapping: Three bidders rotate winning position on GSA construction task orders with high-priced losing bids; validates bid-pattern ML.

scenarios.scenario_description: Three contractors win in rotation across 14 GSA construction task orders; losing bids consistently fall 12-15% above winner; proposal NLP shows 0.84 cosine similarity in technical sections.
scenarios.triggered_workflow: M5 bidder graph -> M2 rotation + NLP similarity -> antitrust referral
scenarios.expected_system_behavior: M5 builds bidder-task-order graph; M2 detects rotation, complementary loss spread, and proposal similarity.

expected_output.recommended_action: Refer to DOJ Procurement Collusion Strike Force

scenarios.pass_fail_criteria: PASS if alert_type='BID_RIGGING_PATTERN', risk_score within ±0.05 of 0.86, anomaly_class matches, recommended_action text contains key tokens. FAIL otherwise.

scenarios.title: Identity-theft tax refund spike

gao_reference.title: Tax Refund Identity Theft
gao_reference.mapping: Mass e-file from one device farm with W-2 mismatches; validates pre-refund ML + device intelligence.

scenarios.scenario_description: 188 e-filed individual returns originate from 6 device fingerprints over 4 hours; W-2 pre-load shows no employer filing for 91% of filers; behavioral typing cadence z-score 5.4.
scenarios.triggered_workflow: M2 device cluster -> M5 behavioral + W-2 mismatch -> M4 freeze cohort
scenarios.expected_system_behavior: M2 clusters returns by device + behavioral signal; M5 confirms W-2 absence; M4 freezes refunds and triggers IP PIN enrollment.

expected_output.recommended_action: Freeze 188 returns; CI fraud referral; victim IP PIN outreach

scenarios.pass_fail_criteria: PASS if alert_type='REFUND_IDENTITY_THEFT_BURST', risk_score within ±0.05 of 0.96, anomaly_class matches, recommended_action text contains key tokens. FAIL otherwise.

scenarios.title: FSIS/FDA duplicate inspection of dual-jurisdiction facility

gao_reference.title: Bifurcated Food Safety Authority
gao_reference.mapping: Facility producing both meat pizza (FSIS) and cheese pizza (FDA) inspected twice in 30 days; validates unified inspection coordination.

scenarios.scenario_description: Establishment #4477A is inspected by FSIS PHIS on 2026-03-04 and by FDA FSMA team on 2026-03-19 — overlapping scope on sanitation programs.
scenarios.triggered_workflow: M5 unified inspection registry -> overlap alert
scenarios.expected_system_behavior: M5 cross-references PHIS and FSMA inspection records and surfaces scope overlap within 30 days.

expected_output.recommended_action: Coordinate joint scope under FSIS-FDA MOU; reduce next visit

scenarios.pass_fail_criteria: PASS if alert_type='DUPLICATE_INSPECTION_RISK', risk_score within ±0.05 of 0.41, anomaly_class matches, recommended_action text contains key tokens. FAIL otherwise.

scenarios.title: Workforce program duplicate enrollment across WIOA + TAA + DOL grants

gao_reference.title: Workforce Development Program Sprawl
gao_reference.mapping: Same individual receives services under 3 federal workforce programs without coordination; validates cross-program participant matching.

scenarios.scenario_description: Hashed participant ID receives concurrent services in WIOA Adult, TAA, and a DOL Apprenticeship grant — funded for the same time period with overlapping training vendors.
scenarios.triggered_workflow: M5 hashed-identity match -> M3 grant cost-allocation review
scenarios.expected_system_behavior: M5 surfaces multi-program enrollment; M3 flags potential double-charging of training cost to multiple awards.

expected_output.anomaly_class: Same participant + same vendor + same period
expected_output.recommended_action: Reconcile cost allocation; recover duplicate share

scenarios.pass_fail_criteria: PASS if alert_type='WORKFORCE_PROGRAM_OVERLAP', risk_score within ±0.05 of 0.62, anomaly_class matches, recommended_action text contains key tokens. FAIL otherwise.

scenarios.title: VA + DoD MHS duplicate community-care payment

gao_reference.title: Veterans' Healthcare Across VA, DoD, and HHS
gao_reference.mapping: Servicemember in transition receives the same outpatient encounter paid by both TRICARE and VA Community Care.

scenarios.scenario_description: Outpatient orthopedic encounter (CPT 27447) paid by TRICARE for $18,442 on 2026-02-09 and by VA CCN for $17,980 on 2026-02-14 — same beneficiary, same provider, same DOS.
scenarios.triggered_workflow: M5 cross-payer claim match -> M2 duplicate-payment block
scenarios.expected_system_behavior: M5 resolves identity across DoD MHS GENESIS and VA CCN; M2 flags duplicate; recovery initiated.

expected_output.anomaly_class: Same DOS / same CPT / same NPI
expected_output.recommended_action: Recover VA CCN payment; update COB indicators

scenarios.pass_fail_criteria: PASS if alert_type='CROSS_PAYER_DUPLICATE', risk_score within ±0.05 of 0.83, anomaly_class matches, recommended_action text contains key tokens. FAIL otherwise.

scenarios.title: Cyber incident double-reporting (CISA + sector regulator)

gao_reference.title: Cybersecurity Authority Overlap
gao_reference.mapping: Same incident reported separately to CISA and TSA; validates incident-report deduplication.

scenarios.scenario_description: Pipeline operator submits incident report to TSA per SD 02C and separate CIRCIA report to CISA; fields differ in narrative but share IOCs, timestamps, and affected ICS endpoints.
scenarios.triggered_workflow: M5 cross-regulator dedup -> unified case
scenarios.expected_system_behavior: M5 maps both reports to a single incident; downstream analytics see one event rather than two.

expected_output.recommended_action: Merge reports; notify operator of unified status

scenarios.pass_fail_criteria: PASS if alert_type='INCIDENT_REPORT_DEDUP', risk_score within ±0.05 of 0.3, anomaly_class matches, recommended_action text contains key tokens. FAIL otherwise.

scenarios.title: Bank examination data-call duplication (OCC + FDIC + FRB)

gao_reference.title: Federal Financial Regulator Fragmentation
gao_reference.mapping: Three regulators request near-identical CRE concentration data; validates NLP dedup of information requests.

scenarios.scenario_description: Mid-size bank receives 3 CRE-concentration data requests within 11 days — column sets overlap by 88%, definitions vary slightly.
scenarios.triggered_workflow: M5 request-dedup NLP -> harmonized response
scenarios.expected_system_behavior: M5 generates one harmonized dataset response with regulator-specific deltas, reducing bank burden.

scenarios.title: STEM education program overlap (NSF + NIH + ED)

gao_reference.title: STEM Education Program Overlap
gao_reference.mapping: Same school cohort served by 3 STEM programs without outcome attribution; validates participant outcome platform.

scenarios.scenario_description: A high school cohort is served by NSF Noyce, NIH SEPA, and ED MSP programs with overlapping intervention windows; outcome attribution unclear.
scenarios.triggered_workflow: M5 participant-outcome match -> M3 effectiveness comparison
scenarios.expected_system_behavior: M5 joins programs at student level; M3 surfaces overlap and recommends attribution method.

expected_output.recommended_action: Apply matched comparison; report combined outcomes

scenarios.title: Homelessness services fragmentation - duplicated intake

gao_reference.title: Homelessness Services Fragmentation
gao_reference.mapping: Same individual intaked separately by HUD CoC and VA HCHV with conflicting vulnerability scores.

scenarios.scenario_description: Hashed client appears in HUD HMIS and VA HOMES with two different VI-SPDAT scores (12 and 7) and two separate housing queue placements.
scenarios.triggered_workflow: M5 federated by-name list -> coordinated entry resolution
scenarios.expected_system_behavior: M5 surfaces dual-intake; recommends single coordinated entry score and unified housing match.

scenarios.title: Disaster recovery survivor re-documentation burden

gao_reference.title: Disaster Recovery Program Fragmentation
gao_reference.mapping: Same survivor asked for same income docs by FEMA, SBA, and HUD CDBG-DR; validates single intake.

scenarios.scenario_description: Hashed survivor uploads identical W-2 PDFs to FEMA IHP, SBA loan, and HUD CDBG-DR portals within 60 days.
scenarios.triggered_workflow: M5 document-hash dedup -> M3 single-intake recommendation
scenarios.expected_system_behavior: M5 matches document hashes across portals; M3 flags as DOB documentation candidate for reuse.

expected_output.recommended_action: Activate cross-program document-reuse with consent

scenarios.title: Broadband BEAD + RDOF overbuild

gao_reference.title: Rural Broadband Programs
gao_reference.mapping: Same serviceable location awarded under NTIA BEAD and FCC RDOF; validates location-level deduplication.

scenarios.pass_fail_criteria: PASS if alert_type='PRE_AWARD_INTEGRITY_FAIL', risk_score within ±0.05 of 0.88, anomaly_class matches, recommended_action text contains key tokens. FAIL otherwise.

scenarios.title: Recipient continuous-monitoring burn-rate anomaly

gao_reference.title: No Shared Post-Award Monitoring Telemetry
gao_reference.mapping: Grantee burns 78% of year-1 budget in Q1; validates ML burn-rate + milestone monitoring.

scenarios.expected_system_behavior: M6 ranks building in top decile for consolidation; produces consolidation NPV with confidence.

gao_reference.mapping: ServiceNow seats with <30-day activity at 41%; validates SAM platform.

scenarios.triggered_workflow: M6 SAM analytics -> true-down recommendation
scenarios.expected_system_behavior: M6 forecasts seat need; recommends true-down at renewal with buffer.

gao_reference.mapping: Shipper splits one order into 18 sub-$800 packages to abuse Section 321; validates shipper-anomaly ML.

scenarios.scenario_description: Shipper 'ZenForm Goods' generates 18 individual Section 321 shipments to a single US consignee within 24h totaling $14,180 declared value (avg $787).
scenarios.triggered_workflow: M1 aggregation pattern -> M2 de minimis abuse score
scenarios.expected_system_behavior: M1 sums same-consignee Section 321 entries; M2 flags as splitting; CBP review queued.

gao_reference.mapping: State pass-through charges same overhead to two federal awards; validates federated cost-charging integrity.

scenarios.scenario_description: State agency charges $312k of administrative overhead to both an HHS award and an ED award in the same quarter via two separate JE descriptions referencing the same cost pool.
scenarios.triggered_workflow: M5 cross-award cost-pool match -> M3 unallowable flag
scenarios.expected_system_behavior: M5 fingerprints cost-pool description; M3 flags potential double-allocation; recovery initiated.

scenarios.title: False-positive: legitimate emergency surge purchase

gao_reference.title: Federal P-card misuse (false-positive control)
gao_reference.mapping: Genuine emergency micro-purchase split is policy-authorized; validates exception-handling.

scenarios.scenario_description: During a declared facility emergency, AO-approved exception permits two same-merchant purchases of $4,200 and $4,000 within 90 minutes; M1 should NOT alert because policy override is logged.
scenarios.triggered_workflow: M4 policy-exception check -> suppression -> no alert
scenarios.expected_system_behavior: M4 confirms AO exception; M1 suppresses split-purchase alert and tags transactions with exception ID.

expected_output.recommended_action: Log for post-event audit; no enforcement

scenarios.pass_fail_criteria: PASS if system raises no fraud alert; risk_score <= 0.30; context tags applied. FAIL if any fraud alert is generated.

gao_reference.title: No Standardized Recovery/Recoupment Workflow
gao_reference.mapping: Overpayment cases prioritized by ML collectibility; validates recovery workflow.

scenarios.expected_system_behavior: M6 ranks cases; outputs work-queue ordered by expected recovery $ within SLA.

scenarios.title: Compound scenario: PPP shell + UI fraud + tax refund theft

gao_reference.title: Compound fraud across UI, PPP, and tax refund
gao_reference.mapping: Single ring exploits identity weaknesses across three programs; validates cross-program identity-graph + shared device intelligence + composite scoring.

scenarios.scenario_description: Investigation reveals 6 device fingerprints + 4 banking ABA tied to: 18 multi-state UI claims (from GG-TC-003), 6 PPP applications (from GG-TC-004), and 188 fraudulent e-filed returns (from GG-TC-020); M5 must compose graph across all three program domains.
scenarios.triggered_workflow: M5 cross-program graph -> M2 ring composite -> M6 aggregate exposure
scenarios.expected_system_behavior: M5 builds unified graph across UI, SBA, IRS records; M2 produces ring-level composite probability; M6 outputs aggregate financial exposure and recommends multi-agency task force.

expected_output.recommended_action: Open MAGIC-style task force (DOJ + state UI + SBA OIG + IRS-CI); freeze all linked accounts

scenarios.pass_fail_criteria: PASS if alert_type='MULTI_PROGRAM_RING', risk_score within ±0.05 of 0.98, anomaly_class matches, recommended_action text contains key tokens. FAIL otherwise.
